onboarding.welcome_subtitle: The most colorful way to learn languages with sentences
onboarding.check_email_body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Confirm your email, then sign in to continue.
onboarding.why_premium_body: Premium removes the small daily caps and opens the fastest path to a real language habit.

learn.title: Sentences to Learn
learn.start_hint: You can start by pressing 'Add to My Learning List' in the Sentences screen.
learn.no_listen_sentences: Add sentences to your learning list to start listening practice.

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.upgrade_for_unlimited: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited quizzes
quiz.fill_blank_help: Type the target language equivalent of each colored keyword. Case doesn't matter.
quiz.no_keywords:
No sentences with keyword markers found.
Add **markers** to your sentences to use this mode.
quiz.min_sentences: At least 2 sentences are required for the quiz.
quiz.empty_hint: Add sentences to your learning list from the Sentences screen to start a quiz.

sentences.title: All Sentences
sentences.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this sentence?
sentences.lang_mismatch_title: Added in a different language pair
sentences.lang_mismatch_body: You added this sentence for {{sourceLang}} → {{targetLang}}. It doesn't match your current settings ({{currentSource}} → {{currentTarget}}). You can edit it to update it.
sentences.lang_change_info: These sentences are only visible here because your interface or target language has changed. They won't appear in study screens like Quiz, Build Sentence, or AutoMode.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty:
No favorite sentences yet.
Tap the heart icon on any sentence to save it here.

add_sentence.title: Add New Sentence
add_sentence.keyword_guide_instruction: Wrap the word or phrase you want to highlight in **double asterisks**:
add_sentence.upgrade_to_add_more: Upgrade to Premium to add more sentences
add_sentence.preset_readonly: You cannot edit this preset sentence.

auto_mode.title: Auto Mode
auto_mode.no_sentences: No sentences in your learning list.
auto_mode.info_body: Only sentences you have added to your learning list are played here. To practice with more sentences, go to the Sentences screen and add them using the "Add to My Learning List" button.

profile.title: Profile
profile.confirm_signout: Are you sure you want to sign out?
profile.no_activity: No activity in this period yet
profile.photo_remove_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove your profile photo?
profile.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.email_confirmation_note: A confirmation email will be sent to the new address. The change takes effect after confirmation.

settings.title: Settings
settings.delete_account_warning: This action cannot be undone. Your account and all data will be deleted.
settings.delete_account_error: An error occurred while deleting your account. Please try again.
settings.notif_body: Learn a few sentences to reach your daily goal.
settings.notif_permission_denied: Notification permission denied. Please enable it in app settings.
settings.leaderboard_visible_desc: When off, you appear as anonymous

premium.title: Go Premium
premium.subtitle: Unlock all features
premium.paywall_subtitle: Full access to all premium features
premium.paywall_context_sentences_subtitle: Premium removes the free sentence cap so you can keep building your own study library.
premium.paywall_context_ai_subtitle: Unlock unlimited AI help, save your best translations, and turn them into study material instantly.
premium.paywall_context_reading_subtitle: Open premium texts, extra reading tools, and a smoother daily reading routine.
premium.paywall_context_quiz_title: Practice as much as you want
premium.paywall_context_quiz_subtitle: Remove daily caps and keep your momentum across quiz, build sentence, and auto practice.
premium.paywall_context_dialog_subtitle: Keep speaking through real scenarios without hitting free-user walls.
premium.paywall_context_games_subtitle: Premium keeps your game streak, score progress, and practice energy moving every day.
premium.legal: Subscriptions renew automatically at the end of each period. Cancel anytime via the App Store or Google Play.
premium.offline_note: Couldn't load pricing. Check your internet connection.
premium.not_configured_note: Pricing is unavailable right now. Please update the app or try again later.
premium.no_packages_note: Pricing is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
premium.success_body: You now have access to all premium features.
premium.restored_body: Your premium purchase has been restored.
premium.not_found_body: No active premium purchase found for this account.
premium.error_restore: Something went wrong while restoring purchases.

pdf_export.title: Download PDF
pdf_export.no_sentences: No sentences found for the selected filter.

reading.title: Today's Text
reading.no_more_subtitle: New texts will be added soon.
reading.quiz_question: What is the target language equivalent?
reading.share_text: I studied the text "{title}" today — learn languages with Parlio!
reading.daily_limit_free: You've completed today's text. Go Premium to read more texts per day.
reading.daily_limit_premium: You've read 3 texts today. Come back tomorrow!
reading.history_premium: Upgrade to Premium to access your reading history and re-learn texts.
reading.relearn_feedback: This text will appear again in the future.

first_quiz.title: First Test
first_quiz.description: You answered your first quiz question

quiz_100.title: Question Hunter
quiz_100.description: You answered 100 quiz questions in total

quiz_500.title: Quiz Genius
quiz_500.description: You answered 500 quiz questions in total

first_automode.title: Active Listener
first_automode.description: You completed your first auto mode session

first_build.title: First Build
first_build.description: Completed your first sentence building exercise

perfect_build.title: Perfect Build
perfect_build.description: Built all sentences correctly in one session

ai_translator.title: AI Translator
ai_translator.subtitle: Natural, idiomatic translation
ai_translator.placeholder: Type a sentence... wrap **keywords** in stars
ai_translator.daily_limit_body: You'll get 15 new translations tomorrow · {{days}} trial day(s) left
ai_translator.trial_expired_body: Upgrade to Premium to continue using AI Translator
ai_translator.tips_body:
• Close the stars before punctuation: write **word**? not **word?**
• Stars highlight the word or phrase to learn — keep it focused
• Write natural sentences for the best results
ai_translator.ai_disclaimer: AI translations may not be perfect. For important matters, we recommend consulting an expert.

leaderboard.title: This Week's Top
leaderboard.premium_blur_title: Go Premium to see the full list
leaderboard.premium_blur_desc: Free users see only the top 2.
leaderboard.not_ranked: You're not ranked this week yet

build_sentence.title: Build Sentence
build_sentence.empty_desc: Add sentences to your learning list, then come back to practice here.
build_sentence.drop_hint: Tap words to build the sentence
build_sentence.limit_desc: Free users can build 5 sentences per day. Go Premium for unlimited practice.

coach_marks.learn_desc: Practice with flashcards from your learning list and test yourself in listening mode.
coach_marks.quiz_desc: Test your knowledge with multiple-choice or fill-in-the-blank questions.
coach_marks.build_desc: Arrange word chips in the correct order to build the target sentence.
coach_marks.read_desc: Expand your vocabulary with daily reading passages.
coach_marks.listen_desc: Listen to sentences and pick the correct meaning from four options.
coach_marks.auto_desc: Sentences play automatically. Go hands-free and just listen.
coach_marks.explore_desc: Explore hundreds of preset sentences by category and add them to your learning list.
coach_marks.ai_desc: Translate sentences with AI, get keywords highlighted automatically, and save directly.
coach_marks.tab_sentences_desc: View, filter, edit and manage all your sentences here.
coach_marks.tab_me_desc: Your stats, streak, quiz results and achievements live here.
coach_marks.tab_more_desc: Favorites, learned sentences, settings and account options are in this menu.

hints.learned_body: Sentences you've learned appear in the Learned section under the 'Me' tab. You can revert them anytime.
hints.add_to_learning_body: These sentences are now ready for you in Study, Quiz, Build Sentence and Auto Mode.
hints.remove_learning_body: This sentence is still in the Sentences tab. You can add it back to your learning list whenever you like.
hints.quiz_done_body: Your results have been added to your stats and streak. Track your progress in the 'Me' tab.
hints.add_sentence_body: It's now visible in the Sentences tab. Add it to your learning list to use it in all study modes.
hints.ai_translate_body: Tap Save to add this translation to your sentences. Keywords will be color-coded and ready for practice.
hints.premium_intro_title: Premium unlocks your full learning path
hints.premium_intro_body: When you're ready, Premium opens unlimited AI help, more reading and dialog practice, and fewer interruptions in your routine.

hub.title: Games
hub.subtitle: Race with words, win your league
hub.inactivity_warning: You haven't played in {{days}} days! Play to keep your {{league}} league
hub.leaderboard_empty: No scores yet — be the first to play!

league.demoted_reason: You dropped a league after {{days}} days of inactivity

speed_round.name: Speed Round
speed_round.desc: Translate words in 60 seconds, build combos
speed_round.tutorial_body:
A word in your target language appears on screen. Choose the correct translation within 60 seconds.

Consecutive correct answers boost your combo multiplier (x2, x3). A wrong answer resets the combo.

word_rain.name: Word Rain
word_rain.desc: Catch falling words, protect your lives
word_rain.pattern: 3 lives • speed increases • catch the translation
word_rain.tutorial_body:
Words fall from the top. Tap the correct translation from the choices below.

If a word hits the ground or you tap wrong, you lose a life. Lose all 3 lives and the game ends.

common.pool_empty: Not enough words for this filter
common.pool_empty_cta: Learn more words and try again
common.score_failed: Score could not be saved. Will retry later.
common.offline_note: You're offline. Score will be saved later.
common.daily_limit_body: You've played your 3 free games today. Upgrade to Premium for unlimited games every day!

audio.music_subtitle: Choose the track that plays during the game

setup.title: Dialog Practice
setup.subtitle: Choose a category and difficulty
setup.no_scenarios: No dialogs available for this category and difficulty yet.
setup.start_failed: This dialog could not be started right now. Please try another one.
setup.remaining_count: This choice has {{count}} unlearned dialogs left
setup.remaining_last: This choice has 1 unlearned dialog left
setup.remaining_complete: You've mastered all dialogs in this choice
setup.completed_body: You've mastered all dialogs in this category and difficulty. You can practice your learned dialogs again or choose a different category or level.

complete.title: Dialog Complete!
complete.learned_modal_body:
You've marked this dialog as mastered. It won't appear in your regular rotation.

Once you finish the others, it may come back.

limit.daily_free_body: Free users can do 1 dialog per day. Come back tomorrow!
limit.total_free_body: You've completed 7 dialogs. Go Premium for unlimited practice!
limit.daily_premium_body: Great work! 3 new dialogs will be waiting for you tomorrow.

error.load_failed: Could not load dialogs. Please try again.
error.session_failed: Could not start session. Please try again.

learned_dialogs.title: My Learned Dialogs
learned_dialogs.empty_subtitle: After completing a dialog, tap 'I've Mastered This Dialog' to mark it.
